sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2  = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set PK = '50', Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2), Amt2 = round(-Amt2,2), Amt3 = round(-Amt3,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = 'H'
update TransX set PK = '40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = 'S'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set PC = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC <> ''
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Amt4 = Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1079400','2851000')

Update TransX set Flex9 = Flex1, FLex2 = substring(Assgnmt,1,7) + ' ' + substring(Flex2,1,8), RefKey2 = GL, GL = '2851000', Amt1 = round(Amt1,2), Amt2 = round(Amt2,2), Amt3 = round(Amt3,2), Amt4 = round(Amt4,2), Flex4 = substring(Assgnmt,1,7), PC = '1420000000', CC = '', TTY = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex2,Flex9,Date1,Flex8,PK,GL,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,PC,Flex6,Flex7,RefKey2) (Select KeyID,Flex2,Flex9,Date1,'','31',Flex4, round(sum(-Amt1),2), round(sum(-Amt2),2), round(sum(-Amt3),2), round(sum(-Amt4),2), 'Concur Empl Inv for Doc ' + cast(Flex9 as varchar(10)) + ',  ' + substring(Assgnmt,9,8), '1420000000','Z001','','0000000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID,Flex2,Flex9,Date1,Flex4,substring(Assgnmt,9,8))
Update x set GLdesc = v.Name from TransX x inner join Vendors v on v.Co = '4010' and x.GL = v.Vend where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '31'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex9,Flex4,RefKey2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) + ' ' + substring(Flex2,1,8) as Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,(case when PK = '40' then '50' else '40' end) as PK,round(-Amt1,2),round(-Amt2,2),round(-Amt3,2),round(-Amt2,2) as Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex1 as Flex9,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) as Flex4,GL as RefKey2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL = '6210000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex9,Flex4,RefKey2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) + ' ' + substring(Flex2,1,8) as Flex2,Assgnmt,'6210002' as GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt2 as Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex1 as Flex9,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) as Flex4,GL as RefKey2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL = '6210000')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex9,Flex4,RefKey2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) + ' ' + substring(Flex2,1,8) as Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,(case when PK = '40' then '50' else '40' end) as PK,round(-Amt1,2),round(-Amt2,2),round(-Amt3,2),round(-Amt2,2) as Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex1 as Flex9,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) as Flex4,GL as RefKey2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL = '6217000' and Txt like 'MESSENGER SERVICES%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,Flex2,Assgnmt,GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex9,Flex4,RefKey2) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Flex1,Qtr,Date1,Crcy,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) + ' ' + substring(Flex2,1,8) as Flex2,Assgnmt,'6915000' as GL,PK,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt2 as Amt4,Txt,PC,CC,TTY,RefKey3,Flex1 as Flex9,substring(Assgnmt,1,7) as Flex4,GL as RefKey2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL = '6217000' and Txt like 'MESSENGER SERVICES%')
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.GL like '6%'
update TransX set PC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(CC,'') <> ''
